meaning.zh: 靈感的湧現、純真、情感的種子與驚喜。
meaning.en: New inspiration, innocence, emotional beginnings, and surprises.

ecology.zh: 初出茅廬的小石虎，帶著好奇心探索溪流與水岸。
ecology.en: A young leopard cat exploring streams and riverbanks with curiosity.

generation.image_prompt: Mystical 1900s lithography tarot card illustration. Clean bold black ink outlines. A curious and innocent young anthropomorphic Taiwan leopard cat (Page) standing by a stream bank, looking up as a dream-fish pops out of a golden cup. High-fidelity biological markers: juvenile narrow head, distinct white forehead lines, large white ear-patches, rosette patterns. 2:3 vertical. Full bleed. No borders.
generation.narrative: The Page of Cups represents the spark of discovery—the first time a kitten explores the wonders of the water edge.
